headline: CRM Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y on ARR Milestone
summary: Salesforce tops Q1 estimates as revenues rise 13% and Agentforce ARR clears $1B; outlook is raised, and a $25B accelerated buyback kicks off.

headline: Snowflake Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y, Shares Up
summary: SNOW tops fiscal first-quarter estimates with 33% revenue growth and raises full-year product revenue guidance. The stock gained nearly 35% in pre-market trading.

raw.headline: Snowflake Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y, Shares Up
raw.summary: SNOW tops fiscal first-quarter estimates with 33% revenue growth and raises full-year product revenue guidance. The stock gained nearly 35% in pre-market trading.

headline: Why We Initiated A Position In Amphenol Corporation
summary: This quarter we initiated a position in Amphenol, a leading provider of high-technology interconnect, sensor, and antenna solutions to a diverse set of end markets.
